tools.name: fetch_signals
tools.description: Fetch all signals (social, weather, traffic) from the CIRO Signal Server in a single aggregated call. Returns bundle_id, timestamp, social array (mock + real news), weather array (real Open-Meteo + mock PMD), and traffic array. This is the primary tool for the Sentinel agent.

real_apis.weather: boolean — true if Open-Meteo data included
real_apis.news: boolean — true if NewsAPI data included

tools.name: fetch_social_signals
tools.description: Fetch only social media signals with optional limit parameter. Returns mock crisis/normal signals plus real news signals when available.

tools.name: fetch_weather
tools.description: Fetch weather alerts for Pakistan cities. Returns real Open-Meteo data when available (4 cities: Islamabad, Lahore, Karachi, Rawalpindi), combined with mock PMD alerts for crisis scenarios.

tools.name: fetch_traffic
tools.description: Fetch traffic congestion data for major road segments in Pakistan. Congestion scores 0-100, anomaly threshold at 70+.

response_schema.segments: array of TrafficSegment objects with congestion_score, anomaly_detected

tools.name: fetch_available_units
tools.description: Fetch all rescue units with current status, location, and availability. Returns summary counts and full unit array. Used by Commander for intelligent unit selection.

response_schema.units: array of Unit objects with unit_id, name, type, status, base_lat, base_lng, current_lat, current_lng, destination, eta_minutes, assigned_crisis_id

tools.name: dispatch_unit
tools.description: Dispatch a specific rescue unit to a crisis location. Updates unit status to 'dispatched' in Firebase, sets destination, ETA, and assigned crisis. Optionally updates unit position to midpoint toward destination.

tools.name: trigger_scenario
tools.description: Trigger a pre-built crisis scenario by name. Activates crisis signals on the signal generator and sets system to simulation mode in Firebase.

path_params.scenario_name: string — one of: urban_flood_g10, road_accident_m2, heatwave_lahore, power_failure_i8

tools.name: reset_simulation
tools.description: Reset all Firebase state to monitoring baseline. Clears active crises, alerts, reroutes, agent logs. Resets all 5 units to 'available' status at their base positions. Sets system mode to 'monitoring'.

tools.name: check_escalation
tools.description: Check if an active crisis needs escalation based on new incoming signals, time elapsed since detection, and trigger keyword analysis. Returns escalation recommendation with reasoning.

path_params.crisis_id: string — the ID of the active crisis to check

response_schema.trigger_matched: string — which escalation trigger was matched

tools.name: firebase_write
tools.description: Write data to Firebase Realtime Database. Supports three operations: 'set' (overwrite entire path), 'update' (merge fields at path), and 'push' (append with auto-generated ID). All writes are immediately reflected in the Flutter dashboard via real-time streams.

parameters.data: object — JSON data to write at the path

tools.name: firebase_read
tools.description: Read data from Firebase Realtime Database at a specified path. Returns the JSON value stored at that path, or null if path does not exist.

parameters.path: string — Firebase path to read from (e.g., '/units/1122-ISB-04', '/active_crises')
